title: Deep Learning-Based Detection of Referable Diabetic Retinopathy and Macular Edema Using Ultra-Widefield Fundus Imaging
summary: Presents a deep learning pipeline for the MICCAI UWF4DR challenge that analyzes ultra-widefield fundus images to assess image quality and flag referable diabetic retinopathy and diabetic macular edema, aiming to catch peripheral retinal lesions that standard fundus photography can miss.

title: A systematic review on diabetic retinopathy detection and classification based on deep learning techniques using fundus images
summary: Reviews deep learning methods for grading diabetic retinopathy from fundus photographs, covering how CNN-based models detect microaneurysms, hemorrhages, exudates, and other retinal features used for staging disease severity.

title: Analysis of Diabetic Retinopathy Based on Deep Learning
summary: Applies AlexNet and ResNet101-based feature extraction to automatically detect and grade diabetic retinopathy severity from fundus images.

title: An advanced deep learning method to detect and classify diabetic retinopathy based on color fundus images
summary: Uses a YOLOv3-based object detection model to identify and classify diabetic retinopathy lesions in color fundus photographs, aiming to improve diagnostic reliability.

title: A deep learning based model for diabetic retinopathy grading (RSG-Net)
summary: Introduces RSG-Net, a deep neural network for grading diabetic retinopathy severity into multiple clinical stages from retinal fundus images, aiming to speed up screening.

title: Deep Learning for the Diagnosis of Esophageal Cancer in Endoscopic Images: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
summary: Systematic review of convolutional neural network models applied to endoscopic images for detecting and diagnosing esophageal cancer, evaluating their performance against endoscopist assessment.

title: Enhancing Diagnostic Precision in Thyroid Nodule Classification: A Deep Learning Approach to Automated Ultrasound Image Analysis
summary: Develops a CNN-based model trained on thyroid ultrasound images to automatically detect, segment, and classify thyroid nodules as benign or malignant, using histopathology-confirmed labels for validation.

title: Advancing Brain Tumor Diagnosis Using Deep Learning: A Systematic Review on Glioma Segmentation and Classification on Multiparametric MRI
summary: Reviews deep learning approaches for segmenting and classifying gliomas using multiparametric MRI sequences (T1, T2, T1ce, FLAIR), covering how different sequences aid tumor delineation and diagnosis.

title: Brain Tumor Multi Classification and Segmentation in MRI Images Using Deep Learning
summary: Combines an EfficientNetB1 classifier with a U-Net segmentation model to classify brain MRI scans into meningioma, glioma, pituitary adenoma, or no-tumor categories, and to isolate tumor regions.

title: A Deep Learning Approach for Brain Tumor Classification and Segmentation Using a Multiscale Convolutional Neural Network
summary: Proposes a multiscale CNN trained on T1-contrast-enhanced MRI to jointly segment and classify meningioma, glioma, and pituitary tumors across sagittal, coronal, and axial views.

title: Brain Tumor Segmentation from MRI Images using Deep Learning Techniques (cascaded CNN + Faster R-CNN)
summary: Chains a CNN classifier, a Faster R-CNN localizer, and the Chan-Vese algorithm in sequence to detect, localize, and precisely segment meningiomas and gliomas in axial brain MRI scans.

title: Multi-class brain tumor MRI segmentation and classification using deep learning and machine learning approaches
summary: Compares 2D-UNet and 3D-UNet segmentation alongside classical ML classifiers (KNN, SVM, gradient boosting) and CNNs like VGG16 for classifying brain tumors into six subtypes including glioma and schwannoma.
